sourceBasis.directive: Only reproducible Chronos-managed historical OHLCV/derived-target inputs with real paths, schemas, date ranges, and SHA-256 hashes are admissible. Memory/narrative/synthetic/unverified cached results excluded.

admissibleEvidenceBasis: Only reproducible Chronos-managed historical OHLCV/derived-target inputs with real paths, schemas, date ranges, and SHA-256 hashes are admissible. Memory/narrative/synthetic/unverified cached results excluded.
displayWarnings: Sentinel full-suite freeze-review remains BLOCKED for incomplete Tibot-owned canonical freeze payloads/provenance; see source_basis.sentinel_audits.full_suite_freeze_review.
Next-candle HGB53 canonical Chronos source bundle exists only for BTCUSDT 5m/1h; BTCUSDT 4h/1D are 46-feature variants and not canonical.
RMW 4h/1D dir/qbucket artifacts are real/hash-bound but PENDING_SENTINEL and ineligible until PASS.
Classification and strategy families are out of scope; no concrete registered family rows found in Tibot matrix.
Any cached selection/training/dashboard result not reproducible from these paths/hashes is invalid and must be rerun by the owning agent.
